dailyNews.description: Saudi Arabia’s key East-West oil pipeline attacked: Sources told FT that a pumping station was hit by a drone at about 1pm local time on Wednesday. They said the damage was being assessed.

dailyNews.description: Following 40 days of war, a 15-day ceasefire has been agreed upon by the US, Israel, and Iran, with peace discussions planned in Islamabad. The international response is largely positive, focusing on the ceasefire's fragility and Trump's insistence on halting Iran's uranium enrichment.

dailyNews.title: World Athletics postpones Doha Diamond League amid US-Israel war on Iran
dailyNews.description: The multi-discipline event scheduled for May 8 will now be held on June 19 should conditions allow, organisers say.

dailyNews.description: The spate of calls, social media messaging, and diplomatic efforts from Pakistan in recent weeks, especially involving PM Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munir, raises many questions.

dailyNews.title: Operation Epic Fury LIVE: US Defense Secretary Hegseth says Iran agreed to deal after ‘out of options’
dailyNews.description: US Secretary of State Pete Hegseth said the new Iranian regime “understood that a deal was far better than the fate that awaited them”. “This new regime was out of options and out of time, so they cut a deal,” he said.

dailyNews.description: Across Europe and the globe, the war has damaged economies, roiled politics and underscored a lack of options in dealing with President Trump’s whims.

dailyNews.title: Trump Backs Down, but Questions Remain Over Iran and the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s short-term intimidation may have worked, but the fundamental divides with Iran are as sharp as they were in February.

dailyNews.title: What to Know About the U.S.-Iran Cease-Fire
dailyNews.description: The agreement to pause the fighting for two weeks came hours after President Trump threatened to destroy Iran’s “whole civilization.” Much remains uncertain.

dailyNews.title: Trump Backs Down on Iran, and an A.I. ‘Reckoning’
dailyNews.description: Plus, the great pistachio gamble.

dailyNews.title: To Boost Military Budget, Trump Targets Popular Programs at Home
dailyNews.description: Amid the war with Iran, the president has proposed to scale back some of the very programs meant to ease families’ financial burdens.

dailyNews.title: Only Trump Knows Why Bondi Was Fired as Attorney General, Blanche Says
dailyNews.description: In his first news conference since being elevated to acting attorney general, Todd Blanche said that “nobody has any idea” what led to Pam Bondi’s dismissal other than President Trump.

dailyNews.title: ‘D.E.I.’ Was Erased From N.Y.C. Racial Equity Plan to Avoid Conflict With Trump
dailyNews.description: The changes came as President Trump has moved to erase diversity, equity and inclusion efforts. A Justice Department official still said the report seemed “fishy/illegal.”

dailyNews.title: Iran says Israel violating ceasefire as it keeps grip on Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Iran says Israel is violating the ceasefire deal President Trump announced, and Tehran appears to still have control over shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Dow soars more than 1,300 points, oil tumbles on Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Investors cheered the announcement of a two-week ceasefire, which President Trump said is contingent on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Key details on Iran war after Trump announces ceasefire
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is reacting to news of a ceasefire in Iran brokered by Pakistani officials. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi, Elizabeth Palmer and Elliot Ackerman have more.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth reacts to Iran ceasefire deal and says U.S. will be "hanging around" region
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Dan Caine held a briefing at the Pentagon on Wednesday, hours after President Trump announced a ceasefire in the war with Iran. Hegseth said "we're not going anywhere" and added the U.S. is prepared to resume operations "at a moment's notice."

dailyNews.title: Trump announces 2-week Iran ceasefire after he'd warned 'a whole civilization will die tonight'
dailyNews.description: The earlier threat, some of Trump's most extreme rhetoric since the Iran war started, sparked a wave of Democratic denunciations and mostly silence from top Republicans.
